description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit constructed from dark, wood-like material. The design features a series of interconnected rectangular shelves forming a spiral or maze-like pattern, providing multiple open compartments of varying sizes for storage or display. The structure is robust, with thick panels and a flat top surface, making it suitable for use as a display shelf or room divider in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public spaces. The sides are solid and flat, while the front and back reveal the intricate shelving pattern. The finish appears matte with a subtle wood grain texture, giving it a contemporary and elegant appearance. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible design.
description: A modern, geometric shelving unit with a spiral pattern of open compartments, made from dark wood-like material and finished with a matte texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spiral shelving pattern and all open compartments.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat thickness of the unit with no visible shelves or compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, revealing the same spiral shelving pattern and open compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid, flat thickness of the unit.
